title: Services & pricing
lede: Every project starts with thinking, not decoration. You pay for two things: a point of view and the form that carries it. Pick where you want to start.

tiers.name: Positioning Sprint
tiers.forWho: For owners still deciding. Diagnosis only — no design.

tiers.name: Essential
tiers.forWho: For those who need to launch quickly.

tiers.name: Identity
tiers.forWho: The core package — strategy and design, in full.

features.text: Extended identity — patterns, graphic elements, spacing rules

rules.title: Two revision rounds
rules.text: Every package includes two rounds of edits. Beyond that, $250 per round — so scope stays clear, not open-ended.

rules.title: 50% upfront
rules.text: Half to begin, half on delivery. Always. It keeps both of us committed to the work.

rules.title: Strategy is a line item
rules.text: Discovery & Positioning appears as its own value in your proposal — never a hidden bonus. You see what you're paying for.
